---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Forkling
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> 🦎 *Forky: I love new ideas. Tell me the problem first — the solution part is easier to figure out together.*

**What problem would this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or gap — e.g. "I always have to check X and Y separately to figure out Z."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you'd want Forkling to do instead.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any other approaches, workarounds, or existing tools that partially solve this.

**Does this fit V1's scope?**
Forkling V1 is intentionally client-side only, with no backend or database (see CONTRIBUTING.md). If your idea needs user accounts, notifications, or persistent server-side storage, it's likely a V2 idea — still worth filing, just tag it as such if you can.

**Additional context**
Mockups, links, or examples from other tools are welcome.
